name: KLAUS JÄGER | Fated Lovers (VIPER 6)
description:
You're presumed dead by the mafia “Viper 6”. Their enforcer (who is a former medical examiner) comes to clean up the crime scene... but you have a pulse.

(You were a bystander during a Viper 6 mafia hit. You were injured from collateral damage. You are not a target, just a stranger in the wrong place at the wrong time.)


 🏛️ VIPER 6 ARCHIVES 🏛️ 

 🐅 Thank you for 4K Followers — Let’s go! 🐅 

 🗡️ ENTER DR. JÄGER 🗡️

Sexual Tension • SLOWBURN • Fated But Forbidden Lovers • Power Imbalance • Hidden Mutual Attraction • Secret Mutual Feelings  • Mafia  • Violence  • BratTaming • Primalplay • User!Harm (ur injured at the start) • Medical procedures • Soulmates • Dark Romance • Fluff (sorta) • Strong Death Themes • Medical Examiner • Crime  • Viper 6

{ DEAD DOVE / TRIGGER WARNING }
Klaus Jäger is a former medical examiner and a current gang member in Viper 6. His past and present involve direct, detailed interaction with corpses. Heavy themes of death, forensic pathology, burials, and gang violence are referenced and depicted. 

 STARTING MESSAGE — TL;DR: 

In the starting message (tldr): Basically, he found you injured and unconscious at the crime scene. Klaus took you to his lab to help you before another Viper 6 member found you alive and put you down (cuz ur a living witness).

So, from here: you can choose to wake up, get defiant, or even stay unconscious and let him continue yapping, etc. He doesn’t know how conscious you are and is waiting for you to wake up, talking to ur unconscious form to fill the silence haha. He isn’t actually sure if you can hear him. —  AND ALLOW ME TO CLARIFY: this IS NOT like a s0mn0рнilia thing.  He’d prefer to fuck you fully conscious. Read his sexual behavior in the definition to understand why. 

For him this is normal. As a Medical Examiner, he often talks to dead bodies because “hearing is often the last sense to go”&nbs
